notableEvents.label: Spencer Torkelson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Spencer Torkelson grounds into a double play, shortstop Ben Williamson to second baseman Richie Palacios to first baseman Jonathan Aranda. Riley Greene out at 2nd. Spencer Torkelson out at 1st.
